original_nl_question: Provide the names of politicians who have been heads of government for any country, along with the schools they attended.
original_gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Politician)<-[r0:hasHeadOfGovernment]-(m0:Country) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name, n.schools_attended
corrupted_nl_question: Provide the names of politicians who have been the leader of any country, along with the schools they attended.

MATCH (n:Politician)<-[r0:hasHeadOfGovernment]-(m0:Country) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name, n.schools_attended

original_nl_question: How many politicians are either members of the United People's Party or have served as the head of government in Poland at some point?
original_gold_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Politician)-[r0:memberOf]->(m0:PoliticalParty {name: 'United People\'s Party'}) RETURN n, m0 as m UNION MATCH (n:Politician)<-[r1:hasHeadOfGovernment]-(m1:Country {name: 'Poland'}) RETURN n, m1 as m } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(n)

CALL { MATCH (n:Politician)-[r0:memberOf]->(m0:PoliticalParty {name: 'United People\'s Party'}) RETURN n, m0 as m UNION MATCH (n:Politician)<-[r1:hasHeadOfGovernment]-(m1:Country {name: 'Poland'}) RETURN n, m1 as m } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(n)

original_nl_question: What are the names of all the current and former head of states, listed from the oldest to the youngest.
original_gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Politician)<-[r0:hasHeadOfState]-(m0:Country) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.date_of_birth ASC
